name: Scorching Ray
description: You create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. Each ray requires a separate spell attack roll. A hit deals 2d6 fire damage. +1 ray per slot above 2nd.

name: Shatter
description: A sudden loud ringing noise in a 10-foot-radius sphere. Each creature must make a CON save. Failure: 3d8 thunder damage; success: half. Nonmagical objects automatically take the damage. +1d8 per slot above 2nd.

name: Misty Step
description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Hold Person
material: A small, straight piece of iron
description: Choose a humanoid you can see within range. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw or be Paralyzed for the duration. At end of each of its turns the target can repeat the save. +1 target per slot above 2nd.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: You create a floating spectral weapon that lasts for 1 minute. As a bonus action you can move it up to 20 ft and make a melee spell attack against a creature within 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 + spellcasting modifier force damage. +1d8 per 2 slot levels above 2nd.

name: Prayer of Healing
description: Up to six creatures of your choice that you can see within range each regain 2d8 + spellcasting modifier HP. +1d8 per slot above 2nd.
